turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE BURGER
turns.text: And finally I have announcement number 72-1690, Spence against Washington and for reason stated in a per curiam opinion filed today, the judgment of the Supreme Court of the State of Washington is reversed. Mr. Justice Douglas has filed a concurring opinion. Mr. Justice Blackmun concurs in the judgment. I have a filed a dissenting statement. Mr. Justice Rehnquist has filed a dissenting opinion in which Mr. Justice White and I have joined.
